images.alt_text_de: Fitness-Trainer beim Training in einem modernen Schweizer Fitnesscenter
images.rights_note: Unsplash free license (unsplash.com/photos/1534438327276). Attribution not required but recommended.
images.fallback_behavior: Component renders without image if URL fails
images.phase5_action: Use existing Unsplash URL in DB record; Storage migration planned for Phase 6

notes.no_local_images: Sport & Fitness uses only one external Unsplash image for the hero. No images in public/ directory.
notes.no_scenario_images: Individual scenario articles (berufseinstieg, quereinstieg, etc.) have no dedicated images in the current legacy config.
notes.storage_migration_plan: Phase 6: Download Unsplash image, compress, upload to Supabase Storage under theme-worlds/ bucket, update DB record hero_image_url to storage URL
notes.og_image: No dedicated OG image - component falls back to /og-default.png
